{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230114273D0057715B1CD17CA233"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609697069858603801","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"支持一下，毕竟是新人[我也强推]到时候火了还混成元老嘞。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771771712,"group_id":"7597281434293767193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"休使圆蟾照客眠。人何在，桂影自婵娟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1eE4V8QIFbTWpgeo4aH+948wjuEiyoUu42dQtWhGn9J","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/02d79dcb6fd44bb09277fb6bc5141067~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789999&x-signature=ZL45J4U9rEpwL%2BlG7kZ8lTOv8sA%3D","user_id":"2555737086376040","user_name":"傅天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2555737086376040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597281434293767193","book_info":{"abstract":"我叫乔峤，17岁，是替身使者，暂住杜王町，梦想是过上平静的生活，为了这个梦想，我和我的同伴们击败了隐藏在杜王町中的杀人魔，但当我以为这样就能过上梦寐以求的平静的生活时，一些意外悄然降临。
雷电芽衣：“不知所谓的崩坏，看我用这九十九万匹磁场转动的悲剧粉碎拳将你轰散呀！”
塔露拉：“即使流尽我的最后一滴血，我也要拯救泰拉，如果我不能从前人的失败再一次拯救泰拉的话，那就让泰拉燃烧吧！”
咕哒子：“人类的赞歌就是勇气的赞歌，人类的伟大就是勇气的伟大！不过就是世界毁灭而已，看我把它肘回去！”
乔峤看着群里各位高手，心中有一种预感，自己平静的生活似乎越来越远了。
（主角是jojo世界本地人，所以不知道其他世界的情况）
（由于作者可能有些作品的设定记不太清了，所以要是看到不合理的地方默认为作者二设）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/bb2f09a57ca4dbcc5409a112b7744534~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"很油的鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7597281434293767193","book_name":"什么年代了还在玩传统聊天群","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597281643774099992","read_count":"17274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"157540"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"39","tags":"动漫衍生,综漫,多女主,二次元","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bb2f09a57ca4dbcc5409a112b7744534~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383667&x-signature=q6a5HDCSzaTOCmqj41S4%2FWmUOog%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1798441354406503","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230114273D0057715B1CD17CA233"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2365},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{
